# MsGamer — Paulina Lorné

> Personal portfolio of Paulina Lorné (MsGamer), Nordic Marketing Manager at Bethesda Softworks. Lifelong gamer driving AAA launches across the Nordics — Fallout, Starfield, DOOM, The Elder Scrolls, and more. Based in Sweden.

## Pages

- [Home](https://msgamer.se/): Overview of Paulina Lorné, her role at Bethesda, current focus areas, and gaming background.
- [About](https://msgamer.se/about): Personal background, gaming origin story, identity as a gamer-turned-marketer, and what drives her work.
- [Career](https://msgamer.se/career): Full career timeline from gaming community volunteer to Nordic Marketing Manager. Includes roles at Thunderful, Tobii, Image & Form, and Bethesda.
- [Press](https://msgamer.se/press): Industry appearances and press features — E3, PAX East, Gamescom, TwitchCon, Dreamhack, P3 Spel.
- [Contact](https://msgamer.se/contact): Contact information and links to LinkedIn and Bluesky.

## Key facts

- Full name: Paulina Lorné
- Online handle: MsGamer
- Role: Nordic Marketing Manager
- Employer: Bethesda Softworks (ZeniMax Media / Microsoft Gaming)
- Region: Nordics (Sweden, Denmark, Norway, Finland, Iceland)
- LinkedIn: https://se.linkedin.com/in/paulinalorne
- Bluesky: https://bsky.app/profile/msgamerse.bsky.social
